title: Recurring Transaction Link
description: Links two related recurring transactions, such as mirrored transfer schedules recorded in separate accounts.

sourceRecurringTransactionId.title: Source Recurring Transaction ID
sourceRecurringTransactionId.description: UUID of the source recurring transaction in the link.

destinationRecurringTransactionId.title: Destination Recurring Transaction ID
destinationRecurringTransactionId.description: UUID of the destination recurring transaction in the link.
